commit_scope: Make Transmission Recipes and the Form substrate playground more visible in navigation.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'
Browser check: desktop /vision secondary nav shows Recipes and More shows Recipes/Form Playground
Browser check: desktop /substrate/form secondary nav shows Form Playground under Pulse
Browser check: mobile header menu shows Recipes and Form Playground with no horizontal overflow
local_validation.summary: Prompt guide, wellness, index generation, evidence validation, JSON parsing, npm install, production build, desktop/mobile browser nav checks, and worktree local web/API verification passed.

commands: Browser check: https://coherencycoin.com/vision exposes Recipes in navigation
Browser check: https://coherencycoin.com/substrate/form exposes Form Playground in navigation

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; CI and public route validation remain pending until PR and deploy follow-through complete.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Visitors can discover Transmission Recipes and the Form substrate playground from contextual navigation and the mobile/header More menu.
test_flows: Desktop /vision check sees Recipes in the secondary layer nav.
Desktop More menu check sees Recipes and Form Playground links.
Desktop /substrate/form check sees Form Playground active in the Pulse secondary nav.
Mobile menu check sees Recipes and Form Playground without horizontal overflow.
Production build confirms nav and locale bundles compile.
